songs.title: 2 hands
feed: “2 hands” by Tate McRae returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 2nd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 85 streams units.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 310,576 total units.
